'''mashufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coacceptor|coacceptor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coacceptor|coacceptor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mashufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshifith|mæshifith]] || [[word:mæshifij|mæshifij]] || [[word:mæshifish|mæshifish]] || [[word:mæshifi|mæshifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashushufuth|mashushufuth]] || [[word:mashushufuj|mashushufuj]] || [[word:mashushufush|mashushufush]] || [[word:mashushufu|mashushufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashufuth|mashufuth]] || [[word:mashufuj|mashufuj]] || [[word:mashufush|mashufush]] || [[word:mashufu|mashufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashuffuth|mashuffuth]] || [[word:mashuffuj|mashuffuj]] || [[word:mashuffush|mashuffush]] || [[word:mashuffuf|mashuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashufuthu|mashufuthu]] || [[word:mashufuju|mashufuju]] || [[word:mashufushu|mashufushu]] || [[word:mashufuku|mashufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashufuth|mashufuth]] || [[word:mashufuj|mashufuj]] || [[word:mashufush|mashufush]] || [[word:mashufu|mashufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashufuthul|mashufuthul]] || [[word:mashufujul|mashufujul]] || [[word:mashufushul|mashufushul]] || [[word:mashufukul|mashufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashufuthuthu|mashufuthuthu]] || [[word:mashufujuju|mashufujuju]] || [[word:mashufushushu|mashufushushu]] || [[word:mashufuku|mashufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashufuthun|mashufuthun]] || [[word:mashufujun|mashufujun]] || [[word:mashufushun|mashufushun]] || [[word:mashufukun|mashufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashufuthuoro|mashufuthuoro]] || [[word:mashufujuoro|mashufujuoro]] || [[word:mashufushuoro|mashufushuoro]] || [[word:mashufukuoro|mashufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
